title: hyssopus officinalis var. altissimus
intro: Hyssopus officinalis var. altissimus, also known as tall hyssop, is a plant species within the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is often used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are primarily attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of tall hyssop include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve digestion. Tall hyssop can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
